name: 500 MG Cyclophosphamide Injection IP
about: 500 MG Cyclophosphamide Injection IP is a potent medication used to treat various types of cancers. It works by slowing down or stopping the growth of cancer cells in the body. This injection is administered by a healthcare professional and the dosage may vary as per the doctors suggestion. The physical form of the medicine is liquid and it should be stored in a cool place. Our product is of high quality and is manufactured in India. As an exporter, supplier, and trader, we ensure that our customers receive the best quality product at an affordable price.

faq.q: What is 500 MG Cyclophosphamide Injection IP used for?
faq.a: This injection is used to treat various types of cancers such as lymphoma, leukemia, breast cancer, ovarian cancer, and lung cancer.
The injection is administered by a healthcare professional and the dosage may vary as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the physical form of the medicine?
faq.a: The physical form of the medicine is liquid.

faq.q: How should the injection be stored?
faq.a: The injection should be stored in a cool place.
The medicine is manufactured in India.
